enemy.name: The Librarian
enemy.special: Phase 2 (HP below 40%): onEnemyTurnStart silences a random card type each turn. Currently silenced: 'buff'

hand.name: Empower
hand.description: Next card deals 50% more damage. [SILENCED this turn]

hand.name: Execute
hand.description: Bonus damage below 30% enemy HP (enemy at 50% now, no bonus yet).

relics.name: Whetstone
relics.description: All attacks +3 base damage. All shields -1 block.

relics.name: Chain Reactor
relics.description: Knowledge Chains of 2+ deal 6 splash damage per chain link.

notes: Librarian in phase 2 silences 'buff' this turn — Empower is locked. Player has chain=3 and Chain Reactor (splash per link). Heavy Strike + Execute doesn't kill it (8 HP, not below 30%). Mirror after Heavy Strike copies the 10-dmg hit. Chain 3 gives multiplicative damage boost. Empower locked. Block costs AP vs preparing for the incoming 10-dmg charge. Player at 32 HP, taking 10 next turn if they don't block = 22 HP. Tricky resource allocation.
